title: Easy Original Thick Bleach - Powerful 99.9% Bacteria Killer - Removes Stains & Destroys Odors - Ultimate Home Disinfectant Solution - Keep Your Home Clean and Hygienic - Pack of 12-750ml Bottles
features: EFFORTLESS CLEANING SOLUTION: Our Easy Original Thick Bleach takes the hassle out of your cleaning routine. With its superior cleaning power, it swiftly tackles dirt and grime on various surfaces, leaving them spotless and germ-free. Say hello to a sparkling home without sweat and effort.

FRESH & INVIGORATING FRAGRANCE: Experience the joy of a revitalizing home atmosphere after each use. Easy Original Thick Bleach features an uplifting fragrance that lingers, creating a refreshing and invigorating ambiance throughout your living space. Now, cleaning not only brings a sense of accomplishment but also a delightful aromatic treat.

CLEANER & HEALTHIER ENVIRONMENT: We understand the importance of a safe and healthy living space for you and your loved ones. Easy Original Thick Bleach is specially formulated to eliminate harmful bacteria and germs effectively, ensuring that your home remains a haven of cleanliness and well-being. Embrace a healthier lifestyle with every swipe.

VERSATILE APPLICATION: With Easy Original Thick Bleach, you have a cleaning ally that adapts to every corner of your home. From kitchen countertops to bathroom tiles, from floors to fabrics, this bleach's versatility knows no bounds. Its multi-surface cleaning prowess ensures that every nook and cranny receives the attention it deserves.

ECONOMICAL PACK: We value your convenience and savings. Our pack of 12-750ml bottles assures that you always have an ample supply of Easy Original Thick Bleach on hand. This cost-effective and practical choice allows you to maintain a pristine home without worrying about running out of cleaning power.
